title: collea adnata
intro: Collea adnata, also known as Coleus, is a popular ornamental plant native to South East Asia, characterized by its vibrant leaves and delicate flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Coleus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
